name: Chocolate Sweetheart Cakes for Two
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour an 8-inch square baking pan.
3. In a medium bowl, stir together flour, granulated sugar, brown sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt. Add water, vegetable oil, white vinegar, and vanilla extract; beat with a whisk or spoon until smooth.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan. Bake 18 to 20 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow cooling for 10 minutes before removing from the pan and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
5. Transfer cake to a cutting board. Using a 3-1/4 inch heart-shaped cookie cutter, cut the cake into four pieces. Spread CHOCOLATE FROSTING on top of two pieces; place the remaining two hearts on top. Garnish with decorating icing (approximately 1/3 cup).
CHOCOLATE FROSTING:
1. Melt butter in a small microwave-safe bowl by microwaving at HIGH for about 20 seconds.
2. Stir together powdered sugar and cocoa powder; add to melted butter alternately with milk, beating until smooth. Stir in vanilla extract.
